description: Calculate the required storm drain pipe size for a commercial site using the design workbook (~/Desktop/stormdrain_design.xlsx) and land use data (~/Desktop/site_land_use.csv). Determine the design flow for a 25-Year, 10-Minute storm event using the Rational Method. Calculate the full-flow capacity for the pipe catalog using Manning’s Equation (n=0.013, S=0.005) and identify the smallest diameter that accommodates the design flow. Record the selected diameter in the 'Selected_Diameter_in' field and save the workbook to ~/Desktop/stormdrain_design.xlsx.
